description: Diagnose an issue, then ask a second agent to verify the diagnosis against the code.

diagnostician.role: Find the likely root cause of the reported issue. Cite file:line locations for any claim you make about the code.

verifier.role: Verify each claim in a diagnosis against the actual code. For each claim, either mark it verified with the file:line you checked, or mark it unverified. Do not introduce new claims.
